children.text: 01 Advisors is a venture and advisory firm. It was founded in 2018 by Dick Costolo (former CEO of Twitter) and Adam Bain (former COO and president of Twitter), with David Fischer (former CRO of Facebook) joining as a partner in 2023. It's headquartered in San Francisco, California.
137 Ventures is a multi-stage venture capital firm headquartered in San Francisco, California. It has over $3 billion in assets under management (AUM) since its founding in 2011.

1832 Asset Management L.P. (“1832 AM L.P.”) is one of Canada’s largest asset managers with over $151.1 billion in assets under management on behalf of retail, institutional and private client investors.
35V (aka Thirty Five Ventures) is the family office of NBA player Kevin Durant and his business partner Rich Kleiman.
Founded in 1997, 360 Capital is a Pan-European early-stage venture capital firm based in Paris and Milan.
3i Group is a British private equity and venture capital firm specializing in mid-market investments in private equity, infrastructure, and debt management.
500 Global, formerly known as 500 Startups, is a multi-stage venture capital firm with $2.4 billion in assets under management.
5Y Capital is a firm providing early-stage venture investments and headquartered in Xuhui, Shanghai, China.
Seven Seven Six (also known as 776) is a venture capital investment firm founded by Alexis Ohanian in 2020.
8VC is a venture capital firm based in Austin, Texas.
A* is a San Francisco based venture capital firm co-founded by Kevin Hartz, Bennett Siegel, and Gautam Gupta.
Abstract is a venture capital firm founded by Ramtin Naimi and Cory Kidd, based in San Francisco.
Abstraction Ventures was a New Orleans-based venture capital firm founded in 2011. It is inactive and no longer making investments.

Acacia Research Corporation is a publicly traded investment firm headquartered in New York City. It was established in 1993 by Bruce Stewart. The firm has a strategic partnership with Starboard Value LP, its controlling shareholder, which has heavily influenced its investment strategies.

Accel Partners is a prominent venture capital firm that specializes in early-stage and growth-stage technology investments. Founded in 1983, Accel is headquartered in Palo Alto, California, and has a strong presence in both the United States and international markets, including Europe and India.
Accelerator Centre is an accelerator and incubator program founded in 2006 and based in Waterloo, Canada.
Acer Inc., founded in 1976 by Stan Shih, is a Taiwanese multinational electronics corporation headquartered in Xizhi District, New Taipei City, Taiwan.

Actua Corporation was a publicly traded venture capital firm and technology investment company based in the United States. Formerly known as ICG Group. It was established by Ken Fox and Walter "Buck" Buckley after their tenure at Safeguard Scientifics.

Adams Street Partners is a global private markets investment management firm headquartered in Chicago, Illinois. Founded in 1972, the firm specializes in early to late-stage venture capital, private equity, and growth investments.
Addition is a venture capital firm based in New York, founded in 2019 by Lee Fixel.
Advent International is a Boston-based private equity firm founded in 1984, specializing in buyouts and growth equity investments.
AE Industrial Partners is a Florida-based investment group that specializes in "national security" related businesses.
AEI HorizonX is a venture capital partnership between AE Industrial Partners and Boeing, investing in aerospace, defense, and industrial sectors. Its headquarters are in Washington, D.C.
AI Grant is an accelerator program established in 2017 by Nat Friedman and Daniel Gross.
AI Venture Labs is an early-stage venture firm that supports AI and cloud-based startups. It's headquartered in Dubai, United Arab Emirates.
Akkadian Ventures is a San Francisco-based investment firm focusing on direct secondary investments.
Alameda Ventures is a venture capital firm based in San Francisco, California, investing in early-stage technology companies.
Albatross Ventures is a venture capital firm founded in 2014 and based in Beijing, China.
Album VC is a venture capital firm based in Lehi, Utah, founded in 2014.

Aleph VC is a venture capital firm founded in 2013 and headquartered in Tel Aviv, Israel. The firm specializes in early-stage investments, focusing primarily on technology startups in Israel. Aleph is a partnership of Michael Eisenberg, Eden Shochat, Yael Elad and Tomer Diari, with $850M under management.

Alibaba Group, founded in 1999 and headquartered in Hangzhou, China, is a global developer in e-commerce, technology, and digital services. The company operates platforms like Alibaba.com, Taobao, and AliExpress.
Aliya Capital Partners is a private equity firm that focuses on investments in middle-market companies.
AlleyCorp is a New York–based early-stage venture capital firm and startup incubator founded by Kevin Ryan.
Ally Capital, also known as Xiyu Ziben (曦域资本), is a private equity firm founded in 2015 and headquartered in Shanghai, China.
Alpha Intelligence Capital (AIC) is a Luxembourg-based global venture capital firm founded in 2018. It has additional offices in San Francisco, Paris, and Hong Kong.
Previously Falcon Edge Capital, Alpha Wave Global is an international investment firm with offices in New York, London, Abu Dhabi and Bangalore.
Alpine Meridian is a New York City-based venture capital and advisory firm founded in 1987 by William (Bill) Benedict.
Founded in 1982, Alta Berkeley is a venture capital firm based in London, England. The company focuses on investing in early-stage and startup technology companies based in Europe and Israel.
Alta Ventures Mexico is an early-stage venture capital firm founded in 2011, with offices in Monterrey and Mexico City.
Founded in 2005, Altair Capital is an early-stage venture investment company headquartered in San Francisco, California.
​Altor Equity Partners is a Stockholm-based private equity firm founded in 2003 by Harald Mix, who was formerly a partner at Industri Kapital, another Nordic-focused private equity firm.
Alumni Ventures (formerly Alumni Ventures Group) is a venture capital investment firm headquartered in Manchester, New Hampshire, USA.
​The Amazon Alexa Fund is a $200 million venture capital initiative launched in 2015 to invest in companies developing voice technologies and Alexa-integrated products.
AME Cloud Ventures is a venture capital firm based in Palo Alto, California, founded in 2012 by Jerry Yang, co-founder of Yahoo!
American Capital Management, Inc. (ACM) is a boutique investment management firm, founded in 1980, with over $3 billion in assets under management as of March 31, 2023.

Ampersand Capital Partners, established in 1988, is a private equity firm headquartered in Wellesley, Massachusetts. They also have another office in Amsterdam, Netherlands. The firm was founded by Richard A. Charpie, who led its spin-off from PaineWebber.
Amplify Partners is a venture capital firm based in Menlo Park, California, founded in 2012 by Sunil Dhaliwal.
AnD Ventures is a Tel Aviv-based venture capital firm that invests in early-stage technology startups.
Andera Partners is a French private equity asset management firm.
Andreessen Horowitz (also known as a16z) is a venture capital firm based in Menlo Park, California, USA. As of 2024, it has $43 billion under management across multiple funds.
Angel Collective Opportunity Fund (ACOF) is a venture capital firm based in San Francisco, California, founded in 2020.
Angel Investor Forum (AIF) is a Connecticut-based angel investment group founded in 2004, focusing on seed and early-stage investments.
Anorak Ventures is a seed and early stage venture capital firm headquartered in San Francisco, California.
Ant Group, founded in October 2014 and headquartered in Hangzhou, China, is a fintech company and a subsidiary of Alibaba Group.

Apax Partners is a global private equity firm founded in 1969 and headquartered in London, UK. The firm specializes in investing in growth-oriented companies across various sectors, including technology. With a global presence, Apax Partners has offices in key financial centers, including New York, Hong Kong, and Tel Aviv.
Founded in 2018, Aperiam Ventures is an early-stage venture capital firm based in New York, specializing in investments in marketing and advertising technology startups.
​ARC Angel Fund is a New York-based angel investment group that primarily funds early-stage companies.
Arctis Global LLC is an investment firm founded in 2021 and owned by Viraj Mehta.
ARK Investment Management, founded in 2014 by Cathie Wood, is an investment management firm based in St. Petersburg, Florida.
Arkin Holdings is an Israeli investment firm established in 2009, headquartered in Herzliya Pituach, Israel. It operates as a multi-asset manager with over $2 billion in assets under management.
Array Ventures is a San Francisco-based venture capital firm founded in 2015, focusing on seed and early-stage investments.
Artha Group is a venture capital firm based in Mumbai, India. It was founded by Anirudh A Damani and Ashok Kumar Damani.
Ascent Capital Partners Pte. Ltd. is an independent private equity fund manager headquartered in Singapore with a local presence in Yangon, Myanmar.
Asian Alliance Investment Corporation is a Philippines-based boutique investment bank founded in 1995.
Asimov Ventures is an early-stage venture capital firm headquartered in New York City.
Ataria is a venture capital firm headquartered in Lima, Peru. Its investors include some of the families behind prominent economic groups in Latin America.
Atento Capital is an early-stage investment firm headquartered in Tulsa, Oklahoma. It's funded by the George Kaiser Family Foundation.

at.inc/ is a venture capital firm founded in 2015 and headquartered in Palo Alto, California, United States. The firm was established by Nadav Eylath and Roni Bonjack, who serve as General Partners. ​

Atlantic Labs is a Berlin-based venture capital firm founded in 2013, providing seed and early-stage investments in software companies. The firm supports companies across Europe, with a particular emphasis on Germany and Denmark.
Atomic is a venture studio founded in 2012 by Jack Abraham and Steph Mui.
AT&T Ventures is a corporate venture capital fund primarily making early-stage investments ranging from Seed funding up to Series B stage companies.
ATW Partners was co-founded by Antonio Ruiz-Giménez, Jr. and Kerry Propper. The firm is a venture capital investment firm based in New York.
Audax Private Equity is a private equity firm headquartered in Boston, Massachusetts, United States.
Audrey Capital, founded in 2008, is an angel investment and research firm based in San Francisco, California, established by Matt Mullenweg, the co-creator of WordPress.
Founded in 2014 by Brano Perkovich and Jed York, Aurum Partners is a venture capital firm based in Menlo Park, California.
Autotech Ventures is a Menlo Park-based venture capital firm that invests in early and growth stage startups. It was founded by Quin Garcia, Alexei Andreev, and Dominique Houde in 2015.
AV Capital is a private equity firm based in Austin, Texas. It was founded in 2016 by Vernon Bryant, who serves as its Managing Partner.
Avalon Ventures is an early-stage venture capital firm based in La Jolla, California.
Avedon Capital Partners is a mid-market private equity firm headquartered in Amsterdam, Netherlands, with an additional office in Düsseldorf, Germany.
Aviv Venture Capital (AVC) is an Israeli venture capital firm that invests in mid-stage technology companies.
AVM Gestioni is a Milan-based asset management and private equity firm founded in 1995. AVM manages multiple funds, including the Cysero Venture Capital Fund.

Avnon Holdings, founded in 1990 by Tomer Avnon, a former Israeli Navy SEAL, is a provider and funder of defense and intelligence technologies. The company offers integrated, national-scale surveillance products to governments, homeland security agencies, law enforcement, and special units in over 80 countries worldwide. Avnon initially established the group to bring advanced technologies and large-scale projects to special units of the IDF.

Awz Ventures is a venture capital firm headquartered in Toronto, Canada with offices in Israel and the U.S. It was founded in 2016 by Yaron Ashkenazi, who served for a decade in the Israeli Security Agency (ISA) VIP Protection Division, leading teams that provided services to several Israeli prime ministers. Its advisory board and strategic advisors include Dame Stella Rimington, former MI5 Director-General, James Woolsey, former CIA director, Tamir Pardo, former director of the Mossad, and Buck Revell, former FBI associate deputy director.

Axon, headquartered in Scottsdale, Arizona, is a public technology company that designs, produces, and markets products and services for law enforcement, military, corrections, and private security sectors. It was formerly named TASER International.

Backswing Ventures is an early-stage venture capital firm founded in 2020, primarily supporting defense technology companies across the U.S. and Israel. The firm is led by Managing Partner and Co-founder Kyle Asman, General Partner Steve Kantor, and Partner Michael Vergura.
Baillie Gifford & Co, established in 1908, is a British investment management firm headquartered in Edinburgh, Scotland.
Founded in 1984 by several former partners of consulting firm Bain & Company, Bain Capital manages approximately $155 billion in assets across multiple investment strategies.
Baker Hughes is a global energy technology company co-headquartered in Houston, Texas, with additional headquarters in London, UK.
Balderton Capital is a London-based venture capital firm founded in 2000.
Balius Partners is a Washington, D.C.–based investment firm. It was founded by Chris Goulakos, who serves as the firm's Managing Partner.

​Balyasny Asset Management (BAM) is a private investment management firm founded in 2001. The firm is headquartered in Chicago, Illinois, USA. BAM was established by Dmitry Balyasny, Scott Schroeder, and Taylor O'Malley. ​
BAM Elevate is a growth-stage investment firm founded in 2001 and headquartered in New York, United States. It operates as a subsidiary of Balyasny Asset Management.
Banyan Fund, L.P.  was founded in 2002 to provide mezzanine capital to smaller middle-market companies headquartered primarily in the Southeast of the United States.
Barzan Holdings is the strategic investment arm of Qatar's Ministry of Defense and the commercial gateway for the country's military defense industry.
Founded in 1983, Battery is a global, technology-focused investment firm with offices in the U.S., Europe and Israel.
Bay Wharf Capital is an early-stage venture capital firm headquartered in Phoenix, Arizona.
The Baylor Angel Network (BAN) is a student-led, faculty-advised angel investing group based at Baylor University's Hankamer School of Business in Waco, Texas.

British Columbia Investment Management Corporation (BCI) is one of Canada's largest institutional investors. The corporation serves as an investment management organization for British Columbia's public sector pension plans and other institutional clients.
BDC Capital is the venture capital arm of the Business Development Bank of Canada (BDC), a Crown corporation wholly owned by the Government of Canada.

BDT & MSD Partners, formed in January 2023 through the merger of BDT & Company (founded by Byron Trott) and MSD Partners (backed by Michael Dell’s family office), is a U.S.-based merchant bank co‑headquartered in Chicago and New York City.

Beacon Angels is a Boston-based angel investment group founded in 2006, specializing in seed and early-stage investments. The group focuses on small and fast-growing companies, typically investing between $100,000 and $300,000 per deal.
Founded in 2018, Bedrock is a venture capital firm based in Austin, Texas, USA.
Behrens Investment Group is an investment manager based in New York City. It was founded by Evan Behrens, who serves as the firm's Managing Partner.

Benchmark is a prominent venture capital firm based in Silicon Valley, California, known for its early-stage investments in technology startups. Founded in 1995, Benchmark has established itself as a key player in the venture capital industry, managing funds that focus on seed and early-stage investments.
Benenson Capital Partners LLC is a real estate firm founded in 1905 that also provides investment services. The firm is headquartered in New York.

Benhamou Global Ventures (BGV) is a Silicon Valley–based venture capital firm founded by Eric Benhamou, former CEO of 3Com and Palm. It's headquartered in Palo Alto, California, with offices in Tel Aviv, Singapore, and Paris.
Berkeley Research Group (BRG) is a global consulting firm headquartered in Emeryville, California. It is under the leadership of co-founder and Executive Chairman Dr. David Teece.
Bessemer Venture Partners is a venture capital firm founded in 1911, with headquarters in San Francisco, California. It has $19 billion in assets under management.
Beyond Capital is a venture capital firm headquartered in London, UK.
Bill Gates is a billionaire investor, philanthropist and co-founder of Microsoft.

BIP Investment Partners is a Luxembourg-based investment firm that focuses on private equity and venture capital. The company was established in 2000 as a joint venture between Banque Générale du Luxembourg (BGL), which later became part of Fortis Group and has since re-formed as BGL, along with several smaller partners, originally under the name BGL Investment Partners.
BITS Spark is an investment initiative connected to BITS Pilani’s alumni network, created to fund and support early stage startups founded by BITS graduates. It's headquartered in Mumbai, India.
​BizTEC is Israel’s national entrepreneurship program, affiliated with the Technion – Israel Institute of Technology.

BlackRock Inc. is the world's largest asset management firm, headquartered in New York City. Known for managing a diverse range of investment products and services, BlackRock oversees trillions of dollars in assets across equities, fixed income, alternatives, and cash management strategies.
Bling Capital is a seed-stage venture capital firm founded in 2018 by Ben Ling, a former general partner at Khosla Ventures.
Bloomberg Beta is an early-stage venture capital fund based in San Francisco, California, founded in 2013 and backed by Bloomberg. It has over $375 million under management.
​Blue Vista Ventures is a venture capital firm based in Chicago, Illinois.
Blum Capital Partners is an investment management firm based in San Francisco, California, founded in 1975 by Richard Blum.
Bm-t Beteiligungsmanagement Thüringen (bm|t) is one of the largest and most active VC companies in Germany.

BMO Asset Management Corp started in 1982 as RMN Investment Counsel Inc. It was bought by Burns Fry Limited in 1991, and after Burns Fry merged with Nesbitt Thomson in 1994, it became part of the Bank of Montreal (BMO).
BOC & Utrust Private Equity Fund Management Co., Ltd. is a private equity firm established in 2010 and headquartered in Guangzhou, Guangdong Province, China.
Bank of China Group Investment Limited (BOCGI), founded in December 1984, is a Hong Kong-based private equity firm and a wholly-owned subsidiary of the Bank of China.

BOCOM International Holdings Company Limited was founded in 1998 and is headquartered in Central, Hong Kong. It is a wholly owned subsidiary of Bank of Communications (BOCOM), one of China's oldest and largest state-owned banks.
BOE Technology Group is a Chinese company founded in 1993 that makes display screens and smart technology products. It's based in Beijing.
Boeing HorizonX Ventures is the venture capital arm of Boeing, based in Chicago, Illinois, focused on investing in early-stage companies in aerospace, defense, and manufacturing.

Bond Capital is a San Francisco-based venture capital firm launched as a spinout of the Kleiner Perkins Digital Growth Fund and was founded by Mary Meeker, Mood Rowghani, Noah Knauf, and Juliet de Baubigny.
Bonfire Ventures is a Los Angeles-based venture capital firm founded in 2017 by Jim Andelman and Mark Mullen.
BOOST & Co is a London-based venture debt provider founded in 2011, tailored for small and medium-sized enterprises (SMEs) across Europe.
Bosch is a global technology and engineering company headquartered in Germany. It develops automotive components, industrial technology, and smart home solutions.
Bossa Invest, headquartered in São Paulo, Brazil, is a venture capital firm specializing in seed and early-stage investments.

Founded in 1997, Boston Millennia Partners is a private equity and venture capital firm based in Boston, Massachusetts. The firm typically invests across various stages of a company's lifecycle, from early-stage ventures to later-stage growth opportunities. Boston Millennia Partners partners with entrepreneurs and management teams to provide strategic guidance, operational support, and access to its network of industry experts and resources.
Boundary Holding is a deep-tech investment firm headquartered in Luxembourg, founded in 2016 by Rajat Khare, a hack-for-hire specialist.
Bowman Capital was a private equity firm based in San Mateo, California. It is no longer active.
BoxGroup is a venture capital firm headquartered in New York. It was founded by David S. Tisch and Adam Rothenberg and invests primarily in early-stage technology companies.
Boyu Capital, founded in 2010, is a private equity and venture capital firm headquartered in Hong Kong, with additional offices in Beijing and Shanghai.

Bpifrance is a French public investment bank headquartered in Paris, specializing in financing and supporting businesses at all stages of development, from startups to large enterprises. Founded in 2013, it provides loans, guarantees, equity investments, and innovation funding.
Brain Robotics Capital (aka BRC Innovation), founded in 2016 and headquartered in Boston, Massachusetts, is a venture capital firm focused on supporting scientist-entrepreneurs.
Breyer Capital is a global venture capital and private equity firm based in Menlo Park, California, founded in 2006 by Jim Breyer.
Bright Success Capital is a Hong Kong-based family office and venture capital firm founded in 2014 by Hilton Tam.
Brightspark Ventures is a Montréal-based venture capital firm founded in 1999, specializing in early-stage investments in Canadian software.
The British Columbia Discovery Fund Inc. was established in 2002 to invest in eligible small businesses as part of British Columbia's venture capital program.

British International Investment (BII), formerly known as CDC Group, is the UK government’s development finance institution. Founded in 1948, its mission is to support sustainable private sector growth in emerging markets, particularly across Africa, Asia, and the Caribbean.
BroadLight Capital is a growth equity firm founded in 2021 by entertainment attorney Kevin Yorn, talent manager Rick Yorn, and investment banker David Dorfman.

Buckley Ventures is a venture capital firm founded in 2019 and headquartered in San Francisco, California, United States. The firm was established by Josh Buckley, who serves as the Managing Director.
BuildGroup is a venture capital and holding company based in Austin, Texas, USA.
​C4 Ventures is a European venture capital firm founded in 2014 by Pascal Cagni, former Vice President and General Manager of Apple EMEIA. It's headquartered in Paris, France.
CAA Ventures is an early-stage venture capital fund based in Los Angeles.
Cacti is a micro venture capital firm based in New York, founded in 2024.
Caerus Investment Partners was a Chicago-based micro-venture capital firm founded in 2014 by Aaron Gillum and James Robinson. It was acquired by Quantum Capital Group.
Calvert Social Venture Partners is a socially oriented venture capital fund. It was founded by Wayne Silby and John G. Guffey Jr. and headquartered in Washington, D.C.
Cambridge Angels is a UK-based angel investment group composed of high-net-worth individuals.
Canaan Partners Israel is a venture capital firm headquartered in Israel, founded by Adi Pundak-Mintz and Ehud Levy.

Canaccord Genuity Group is a financial services firm headquartered in Vancouver, Canada. It operates globally, with a presence in North America, the UK & Europe, Asia, and Australia. The firm is publicly traded on the Toronto Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol CF.

Canadian Business Growth Fund (CBGF) is a Toronto-based venture capital firm, providing capital to privately-owned Canadian businesses. It is supported by Canada’s leading banks and insurance companies.

Cantor Fitzgerald is a global financial services firm founded in 1945, headquartered in New York City. Cantor Fitzgerald focuses on investment banking, institutional equity and fixed-income sales, trading, and real estate.

Capital Group Companies is a global investment management firm founded in 1931 and headquartered in Los Angeles, California. It offers a broad range of mutual funds and other investment products. The firm operates through its subsidiaries, including American Funds, which is one of the largest mutual fund families in the world.
CAS Star, also known by its full legal name Xi'an Zhongke Chuangxing Technology Incubator Co., Ltd., is a venture capital firm and incubator founded in 2013 and headquartered in Xi'an, China.
Castor Ventures is a venture capital firm that's headquartered in San Francisco. It's founded by Jason Warner, and invests in early-stage technology companies with a focus on software, data, and AI.
China Broadband Capital (CBC Capital) was founded in 2006 by Dr. Edward Suning Tian, who serves as the firm's Founding Partner and Chairman.
CCB International (CCBI), founded in 1984, is the investment services arm of China Construction Bank Corporation (CCB).

The Centre for the Development of Industrial Technology (CDTI) is a public entity under Spain's Ministry of Science and Innovation that promotes technological development and innovation among Spanish companies. Its headquarters are located in Madrid, with additional offices and representatives abroad.
CE Ventures (also known as CEIIF) is an early and late‑stage venture capital fund based in Hong Kong.
Cedrus Capital is a private equity investment firm headquartered in Lisbon, Portugal.
Celtic House Venture Partners is a Canadian venture capital firm based in Ottawa. It was founded in 1994 by Terry Matthews and Roger Maggs.
Central Huijin Asset Management Ltd. is a state-owned investment company in China that holds a stake in ZTE Corporation.

CETC Investment Holdings Co., Ltd. is a Chinese state-owned investment firm. It serves as the financial arm of China Electronics Technology Group Corporation (CETC), a major state-owned enterprise in China.

China Electronics Technology HIK Group Co., Ltd. (CETHIK) is a subsidiary of China Electronics Technology Group Corporation (CETC), a major state-owned enterprise in China. It's also the parent company of Hikvision, a large manufacturer of video surveillance technologies.
Ceyuan Ventures is a Beijing-based early-stage venture capital firm established in 2004.
Chaos Ventures is an early-stage venture capital firm based in New York, founded in 2020 by Justin Smith.

CRV (Charles River Ventures) is a venture capital firm founded in 1970 to commercialize research from MIT. The firm focuses on early-stage investments in technology companies and has raised over $4.3 billion across 18 funds.
Charlotte Street Capital is an early stage venture capital firm based in London, United Kingdom.
Chartered Group is a Singapore-based private equity and venture capital firm founded in 2000.

Chemistry VC is an early‑stage venture capital firm based in San Francisco that was co‑founded by investors Mark Goldberg, Kristina Shen, and Ethan Kurzweil, who previously served in Index Ventures, Andreessen Horowitz, and Bessemer Venture Partners respectively.
Cherubic Ventures is a global, early stage venture capital firm founded in 2014, with key presences in Silicon Valley, Taipei, where it's headquartered, and Shanghai.

China CITIC Bank Corporation Limited is a major commercial bank headquartered in Hangzhou, China. It is a wholly owned subsidiary of CITIC International Financial Holdings Limited, which is controlled by CITIC Group Corporation, a state-owned enterprise.

China Electronics Corporation (CEC) is a major state-owned enterprise in China, established in 1989 under the administration of the central government. It's headquartered in Shenzhen, Guangdong Province.
China Merchants Securities Co., Ltd. (CMS) is a Chinese brokerage and investment banking firm headquartered in Shenzhen.
China Reform Holdings Corporation, founded in 2010 and headquartered in Beijing, China, is a state-owned asset management and private equity firm.
China UCF Group, founded in 2003 and headquartered in Beijing, China, is a private equity firm active primarily in the Asia-Pacific region.
Christian Dahlen is a Silicon Valley-based angel investor and a member of the Band of Angels, the region's oldest seed funding organization.
Chuangshi Capital is a Chinese investment and venture capital firm. It's headquartered in Haidian, Beijing, China.
Cisco Systems, Inc. is a leading American multinational technology company headquartered in San Jose, California.

CIT Group is a financial holding company founded in 1908 and headquartered in Pasadena, California. It also operates CIT Bank. In 2020, CIT Group merged with First Citizens Bank in a $2.2 billion stock deal.
Citadel Advisors is part of Citadel LLC, one of the world’s largest hedge funds. It was founded in 1990 and is headquartered in Chicago.
Citadel Securities is a market-making firm headquartered in Miami, Florida, founded by billionaire Ken Griffin.

CITIC Limited (中信股份有限公司) is a Hong Kong-based conglomerate and a constituent of the Hang Seng Index. Originally founded in 1990 as CITIC Pacific, it is a subsidiary of CITIC Group, a state-owned enterprise founded in 1979 by Rong Yiren. Its subsidiaries include CITIC Trust, CITIC Pacific Limited, and Tamar Alliance, among others.
Citic Securities Investment, a subsidiary of CITIC Securities, is an investment advisory firm headquartered in Beijing, China. It was founded in 2012.
City Light Capital is a money management and business development firm based in Greenwich, CT, USA.
Based in Oakland, CA, Claremont Creek Ventures is a venture capital firm investing in early-stage information technology companies, particularly in the San Francisco Bay Area.
Claridge Venture Partners is a family-held venture capital firm serving as the investment arm of the Deitch Family Office.
Clear Future is a private venture capital fund based in Israel.
Coatue is a New York based technology investment firm founded in 1999 by brothers Philippe Laffont and Thomas Laffont.
Colle Capital Partners is a New York-based venture capital firm founded in 2015 by Victoria Grace, who serves as the firm's Founding Partner.
Coller Capital is a London-based private equity firm founded in 1990 by Jeremy Coller.
Comet Labs, founded in 2015 by Melissa Pancoast and Saman Farid, is an early-stage venture capital fund and incubator based in San Francisco.
Connexa Capital is a Miami-based venture capital firm founded in 2022 by Jonathan Beda, a former CEO and co-founder of Zumbini, a spin-off of Zumba Fitness.
Context Ventures is a venture capital firm based in Auburn, Washington, founded in 2021 by Tim Hsia, a U.S. Army veteran and former infantry officer.
Contour Venture Partners is a New York City-based seed-stage venture capital firm founded in 2005 by Bob Greene and Matt Gorin.
Corazon Capital is a Chicago-based venture capital firm founded in 2014, focusing on early-stage investments.
Corbin Capital Partners, headquartered in New York City, is a consulting firm specializing in investment strategies.
Core Capital Partners, headquartered in Washington, D.C., is a venture capital firm managing $350 million in private equity.
Corner Ventures is a Palo Alto-based venture capital firm founded in 2018, specializing in growth-stage investments.
Cornerstone Capital is a private equity investor located in Frankfurt, Germany that focuses its investments on small and mid-sized companies.

Corsa Ventures is a venture capital firm based in Austin, Texas. It was founded in 2011 by Brian Grigsby, who serves as the firm's Managing Partner. Another key member is Kevin Green, a Partner with a background as a U.S. diplomat and corporate litigator.
Costanoa Ventures is a Silicon Valley-based venture capital firm founded by Greg Sands.
Courtside Ventures is a New York-based venture capital firm founded by Vasu Kulkarni and Deepen Parikh.
Cox Enterprises is a global media conglomerate that specializes in communications and automotive services headquartered in Atlanta, Georgia.

Checketts Partners Investment Fund (CPIF) is a New York-based private equity firm founded in 2011 by Dave Checketts. The firm operates under the management of Checketts Partners Investment Management LLC.
Craft Ventures is a venture capital firm founded in 2017 by David O. Sacks and Bill Lee.
Crescent Cove Advisors is a San Francisco-based investment firm founded in 2016.
Cretrend Capital is an investment firm based in Beijing.
Crosslink Capital is a premier early-stage venture capital firm based in Menlo Park, California, founded in 1989 and with over $1.3 billion in assets.

Crossover Ventures, also known as CrossOver Fund Management, is a venture capital firm specializing in growth equity investments in technology companies. Founded in 2003 and headquartered in Palo Alto, California, Crossover Ventures manages over $2 billion in assets focused on late-stage venture capital and growth equity investments.
Crumpton Ventures is a venture capital firm founded by Henry Crumpton and based in New York, specializing in investments in telecommunications, cybersecurity, and robotics.

CRV, formerly Charles River Ventures, established in 1970, is a venture capital firm headquartered in Palo Alto, California, with additional presence in San Francisco. The firm’s name originally paid homage to the Charles River in Boston, reflecting its roots in commercializing MIT research.
The Commonwealth Scientific and Industrial Research Organisation (CSIRO) is an Australian Government agency responsible for scientific research in Australia.
Central Texas Angel Network (CTAN), founded in 2006, is an angel investing group headquartered in Austin, Texas.
Curtin University, established in 1986 and named after former Australian Prime Minister John Curtin, is Western Australia's largest university.
Cyber Mentor Fund is a San Mateo-based venture capital firm founded in 2018, providing early-stage investments in cybersecurity companies.
Dace Ventures is an early-stage venture capital firm founded in 2006 by David Andonian and Jon Chait.
Dacheng Fund Management Co., Ltd. is a Chinese asset management firm that holds a significant institutional stake in ZTE Corporation.
Daiwa PI Partners Co. Ltd. is a Tokyo-based investment firm (part of the Daiwa Securities Group).
Dalus Capital is a venture capital firm based in Mexico City, Mexico, investing in early-stage technology companies in Latin America.
Darahim Investment is an independent private equity and general trading firm based in Abu Dhabi and Dubai, UAE.
Dassault Aviation SA is a French aerospace company that manufactures both military aircraft and business jets. The company is majority-owned by the Dassault Group.
David Gupta is the founder and CEO of BlueVine, a financial technology company headquartered in Redwood City, California.
David Howell Petraeus was a United States Army general who also served as the fourth director of the Central Intelligence Agency (CIA).
DCVC (Data Collective) is a venture capital firm based in San Francisco, California, founded in 2010 by Matthew Ocko and Zachary Bogue.

D.E. Shaw & Co., founded in 1988 by David E. Shaw, is a global investment and technology development firm headquartered in New York City. The firm manages approximately $50 billion in assets across a range of investment strategies, including hedge funds, private equity, and venture capital.
Decacorn Capital is a Singapore-based venture capital firm founded in 2015, specializing in seed and early-stage investments in tech startups.
Declaration Partners is a private investment firm, headquartered in New York, founded by David Rubenstein.
Deep Fork Capital is a venture capital firm, headquartered in Oklahoma City, founded by Trevor N. Davis.
Defy Partners is a Woodside, California-based venture capital firm founded in 2016 by Neil Sequeira and Trae Vassallo.
Delcor Family Office, founded in 2015, is a Melbourne-based investment firm.
Delek Group is an Israeli holding company and investing firm.
Dell Technologies Capital is the venture capital arm of Dell Technologies, headquartered in Palo Alto, California.

Delta Capital Myanmar is a private equity fund manager focused exclusively on Myanmar, established in 2013. The firm was originally called Pun Murray Myanmar Partners (PMM Partners), and rebranded to Delta Capital Myanmar in August 2016.
Co-founded by Tim Draper, John Fisher, and Steve Jurvetson, DFJ Growth is a late-stage global venture capital firm headquartered in Menlo Park, California.

Digital Horizon is a venture capital firm that focuses on early-stage investments in technology-driven companies. It was founded in 2017 and is registered in the Cayman Islands, with offices in London, UK and Tel Aviv, Israel.

Discount Capital is a direct investment firm based in Tel Aviv, Israel. Established in 1992, it serves as the private equity and venture capital arm of Israel Discount Bank Ltd. It invests directly in companies and business ventures as well as in investment funds.
The DMZ is Toronto Metropolitan University's business incubator for early-stage technology startups.

DN Capital is an international venture capital firm founded in 2000 by Nenad Marovac and Steve Schlenker, both alumni of Harvard Business School. The firm has offices in London, Berlin, and San Francisco.

DNS Capital is a private investment firm founded by the D. E. Shaw Group’s co-founders, pursuing investments across various sectors, including technology and financial services. Founded in 2014, the firm focuses on both public and private equity investments.
Founded in 2011, DNX Ventures is a Silicon Valley-based venture capital firm specializing in early-stage investments in B2B startups.
Dodge & Cox is a global investment management firm. It holds about 44.49 million shares of Raytheon Technologies (3.33% of the company).
Headquartered in Doha, Qatar, Doha Venture Capital (DVC) is a Qatari venture capital firm investing in startups and growth-stage companies globally.

Established in 1995, the Department for Promotion of Industry and Internal Trade (DPIIT) is a central government department under the Ministry of Commerce and Industry in India, headquartered in New Delhi.
Dragoneer Investment Group is an investment firm founded in 2012 by Marc Stad and headquartered in San Francisco, California.
DRW Venture Capital is the corporate venture arm of DRW Holdings, founded in 2011 by Donald R. Wilson Jr. The firm is headquartered in Chicago, Illinois, United States.

​Founded in 2015, Digital Transformation Capital Partners (DTCP) is a Hamburg-based investment management firm with $3 billion in assets under management, with investments across Europe, the U.S., and Israel.
D:Tribe Capital was a Singapore-based venture capital firm. It is no longer active.
Duggal Visual Solutions is a Brooklyn-based provider of photo imaging, large-format printing, and digital display solutions.

E1 Ventures, headquartered in San Francisco, California, is a data-driven venture capital firm specializing in tech investments, but primarily focusing on industries such as AI, machine learning, and aerospace.
EASO Ventures is a private venture capital firm headquartered in Donostia-San Sebastián, Spain, with additional offices in Bilbao and Pamplona.
East Valley Ventures is a Saint John, New Brunswick-based Canadian investment firm founded in 2011. It operates as an accelerator, angel group, and venture capital firm.
East Ventures is a venture capital firm headquartered in Singapore, with additional operations in Indonesia and Japan.
Eastern Bell Venture Capital (钟鼎资本) is a Shanghai-based venture capital firm. Li Yan is the primary founder and currently serves as the President. Other co-founders include Mei Zhiming and Tao Tang.

Eaton Vance Management is a prominent American investment management firm headquartered in Boston, Massachusetts. In March 2021, the firm was acquired by Morgan Stanley, becoming part of its Investment Management division.
Eclipse Ventures is a venture capital firm founded by Lior Susan.
EDBI is a corporate investment arm of Singapore's Economic Development Board.

Edenbrook Capital, LLC is a private investment firm based in Mount Kisco, New York. Founded by Jonathan Brolin in 2011, the firm specializes in a concentrated, value-oriented investment approach, primarily focusing on small to mid-cap public companies.
Edison Partners, founded in 1986 by John Martinson and headquartered in Princeton, New Jersey, is a growth equity firm.
Ehud Barak is the 10th Prime Minister of Israel, the 14th Chief of Staff of the Israel Defense Forces, former Minister of Defense and former head of military intelligence.
The EIC Fund is the venture investment arm of the European Innovation Council (EIC).
Established in 1969, Eight Roads Ventures was initially known as Fidelity Ventures and operated out of Boston, later becoming the corporate venture capital arm of Fidelity International.

Eileen Murray is an American financial services executive. She was formerly the Co-Chief Executive Officer of Bridgewater Associates, the world's largest hedge fund, where she served from 2011 to 2020.
Elaia is a Paris-based venture capital firm founded in 2002, specializing in early to growth-stage investments in digital and deep tech startups. It has over €700 million under management.

Eldridge is a diversified investment firm headquartered in Greenwich, Connecticut.  Founded by Todd Boehly, Eldridge operates as a venture capital company. Beyond venture capital, Eldridge engages in private equity, credit, insurance, and asset management.
Electric Ant is a Los Angeles-based venture capital firm founded in 2021, providing investments in crypto technology companies.

Elevate Innovation Partners is an early-stage venture capital firm founded in 2015, headquartered in New York, United States. The firm was co-founded by Shreyas Slater Chityala, who serves as CEO and Managing Partner, and Thomas Rudy, General Partner. The team also includes Sridhar Chityala as Chairman.

Elevation Capital (previously known as SAIF Partners) is a venture capital firm headquartered in Hong Kong, with additional offices throughout China including Beijing, Shanghai, Shenzhen, Xiamen, Qingdao, Nanjing. It also maintains an office in India.
Elevator Fund is a venture capital firm based in Tel Aviv with additional offices in New York.

Elliot Investment Management, founded by Paul Singer in 1977, is a prominent hedge fund and activist investor based in New York City. The firm manages significant assets and specializes in distressed debt and equity investments, often taking activist stances to influence corporate governance and strategic direction in targeted companies.
Based in New York, Elsted Capital Partners is a family investment office providing early stage venture capital.

EMC Corporation, founded in 1979 by Richard Egan and Roger Marino, was an American provider of data storage systems and related services, headquartered in Hopkinton, Massachusetts. In 2016, Dell acquired EMC for $67 billion, integrating it into Dell Technologies and rebranding it as Dell EMC.
Emerge is an early stage, Tel-Aviv based venture capital firm.
Emergent Ventures is a Connecticut–based venture capital firm founded in 2020.
EmieLab is a Hong Kong-based venture capital firm that invests in early-stage technology startups.
Founded in 1984, Enam Holdings is a privately managed principal investment group based in Mumbai, India, with a 30-year legacy in Indian capital markets.
Endeavor8 is a venture capital firm founded in 2021 and headquartered in San Francisco, California. Karl Kerksiek is its founding partner.
Energy Innovation Capital is a venture capital firm founded in 2016 by Kevin Skillern and W. George Coyle.
Engel Ventures is a Santa Barbara-based venture investment firm founded in 2014, focusing on early-stage companies in technology.
Entrée Capital is a global venture capital firm headquartered in Tel Aviv, with additional offices in London and New York.
Esousa Group Holdings LLC is a New York-based private investment firm founded by Michael Wachs.
Espresso Capital is a venture debt firm founded in 2009, headquartered in Toronto, Canada.
EthAum Venture Partners is an incubator and accelerator for companies that are looking for customers and partners in the Association of Southeast Asian Nations (ASEAN).
The European Union (EU) is a political and economic union of 27 European countries that work together to promote economic integration and political cooperation across the continent.
Everstate Capital, also known as Shenzhen Qianhai Hengbang Equity Investment Co., Ltd, is a private equity firm based in Shenzhen, China.
Exponent Founders Capital is an early‑stage venture capital firm based in New York City that was co‑founded in 2021 by Charley Ma and Mahdi Raza.
F&G Venture (方广资本) is a Shanghai-based venture capital firm.
F50 is a venture capital firm founded in 2014 by David Cao, Tel Liu, Brad Strum, Martin Stroka and Eric Ly. It's headquartered in San Francisco, California.
Fantail Ventures is a New York based venture capital firm founded by Jonty Kelt.
The Federal Aviation Administration (FAA) is the U.S. government agency responsible for regulating and overseeing civil aviation. It operates under the U.S Department of Transportation.

Federmann Enterprises is a family-owned private holding company with investments in a range of defense technologies. It is chaired by Michael Federmann, an Israeli drone manufacturer and billionaire in charge of Elbit Systems and the Dan Hotels group.
Feld Ventures is a venture capital firm founded by Shane Feldberg and based in Toronto, Canada.
Felicis Ventures is a venture capital firm founded by Aydin Senkut, an early Google employee.
Felicitas Global Partners is a privately held alternative investment firm founded in 2012. It was founded by Bonar Chhay, who serves as the Managing Partner.

Fidelity Investments is one of the largest and most diversified financial services firms in the world. Founded in 1946 and headquartered in Boston, Massachusetts, Fidelity offers a wide range of services including investment management, retirement planning, brokerage, and financial advisory services.
Fifth Down Capital is a Boston, Massachusetts-based venture capital firm founded in 2014 by Andrew “Andy” Spellman.
​Fifth Wall is a venture capital firm founded in 2016 by Brendan F. Wallace and Brad Greiwe. It's headquartered in Los Angeles, California, with additional offices in New York City.
Headquartered in Tel Aviv, FinTLV Ventures is a venture capital firm that provides early stage, late stage, and seed investments in Israeli companies.
First Bridge Fund is an investment firm based in Bandra, Maharashtra, India, specializing in early-stage and venture capital funding.
First Eastern Investment Group is a Hong Kong-based private equity and venture capital firm founded in 1988 by Victor Chu. It has additional offices in Beijing, Shanghai, London, and Dubai.
First Light Ventures is a venture capital fund managed by Gray Ghost Ventures. The fund is located in Atlanta, Georgia.
Founded by Josh Kopelman and Howard Morgan, First Round Capital is an early stage investor in Silicon Valley.
Firsthand Technology Value Fund, Inc. (OTCQB: SVVC) is a publicly traded venture capital fund based in San Jose, California.
Firstime Venture Capital, founded in 2014, is a Tel Aviv-based venture capital firm. The firm's leadership includes Managing Partners Jonathan Benartzi and Nir Tarlovsky.
Five Elms Capital is a Kansas City-based growth equity firm founded in 2007, specializing in investments in B2B software companies. It has over $2.4 billion in assets under management.
FJ Labs is a New York-based investment firm founded in 2015.
Founded in 2018, Flexcap Ventures is a venture capital firm based in New York.
​FM Capital is a venture capital firm founded in 2012 by Chase Fraser and headquartered in Boulder, Colorado. The legal name of the company is Fraser McCombs Capital Management LLC.
Forebright Capital is a Hong Kong–based private equity firm founded in 2014, with an additional office in Shenzhen. The firm was founded by Henry Liu, Kiril Ip, Ling He, and Xiangli He.
Forgepoint Capital, headquartered in San Mateo, California, is a venture capital firm specializing in early-stage investments.
Fort Point Angels is a Boston-based angel investment group founded in 2012, specializing in seed and early-stage investments.

Forté Ventures is a U.S.-based venture capital firm headquartered in Atlanta, Georgia, that co-invests alongside corporate venture capital groups and institutional investors. It was founded by Tom Hawkins, who also co-founded Arcapita Bank’s venture capital business in 2005. Previously, he served as an Investment Partner with Siemens Venture Capital and as a General Partner at Cordova Ventures in Atlanta.
Fortress Investment Group was a U.S.-based investment management firm. In 2023, it was acquired by Mubadala Investment Company, a sovereign wealth fund of the United Arab Emirates.
Founded in 2000, Fortune Capital is a venture capital firm based in Shenzhen, China.
Founder Collective is a seed-stage venture capital firm based in Cambridge, Massachusetts, founded in 2009.
​Founder.org is a venture capital firm and accelerator founded in 2012 by Michael Baum. It has since rebranded to Founder VC.
Established in 2005 by Peter Thiel, Ken Howery, and Luke Nosek, Founders Fund is a prominent venture capital firm based in San Francisco.
FoundersX Ventures is a Silicon Valley-based venture capital firm led by a team with academic roots in Stanford and Harvard.
Foxconn Technology Group, also known as Hon Hai Precision Industry Co., Ltd., is a Taiwanese multinational electronics manufacturing company founded in 1974 by Terry Gou.
Foxteq Holdings is a subsidiary of Hon Hai Precision Industry Co., Ltd. (Foxconn Technology Group). It's headquartered in George Town, Cayman Islands.

Francisco Partners is a private equity firm headquartered in San Francisco, California, specializing in investments in technology companies. Founded in 1999, Francisco Partners manages approximately $24 billion in assets.
Freedom Holding Corp. is a US-based investment conglomerate registered in Nevada, providing financial services across Central Asia and other regions.
Founded in 2000, FreshTracks Capital is a venture capital firm founded by Cairn Cross and Charles Kireker and based in Vermont, USA, focused on early-stage investments.
Friends & Family Capital is a Silicon Valley-based venture capital firm founded in 2019 by former Palantir CFO Colin Anderson and venture capitalist John Fogelsong.
Frontline Ventures is a London-based venture capital firm founded in 2012.
Balderton Capital is a London-based venture capital firm founded in 2000.
G2 Investment Partners Management LLC operates as an investment management firm. The company provides investment advisory services to pooled investment vehicles.
Founded in 1962, Gandyr Investments is a private equity firm based in Herzliya, Israel.
Founded in 1906, Gannett is a media and marketing solutions company headquartered in New York.
Gaspar Global Ventures is a micro venture capital firm based in New York, founded in 1996 by Andrew Gaspar.
GCM Grosvenor is an asset management firm based in Chicago. It was founded in 1971 by Richard Elden.
GCP Capital Partners is a New York-based private equity firm. It was co-founded by Robert H. Niehaus and V. Frank Pottow.
Genacast Ventures, headquartered in New York City, is a seed-stage venture capital firm.
GENEO Capital Entrepreneur is a Paris-based investment firm founded in 2019, focusing on supporting small and medium-sized enterprises and mid-sized companies.
General Atlantic is a New York-based global growth equity firm founded in 1980 by businessman and philanthropist Charles F. Feeney.
General Catalyst is a venture capital firm based in Cambridge, Massachusetts.
General Global Capital is an investment firm based in San Francisco, California, USA.
Generali Group, operating locally as Assicurazioni Generali S.p.A., is an Italian insurance company based in Trieste and considered the largest insurance company in Italy.

Genesis Partners, headquartered in Tel Aviv, Israel, is a venture capital firm known for its investments in early-stage technology companies. Founded in 1996, Genesis Partners has a long track record of supporting startups in various sectors, including information technology, communications, and new media.
Genezis Capital is a high-tech venture capital and private equity firm founded in 2013 and headquartered in Moscow, Russia.
Genstar Capital is a San Francisco-based private equity firm with approximately $35 billion in assets under management.

Geode Capital Management LLC is a global asset management firm headquartered in Boston, Massachusetts. Founded in 2001, Geode manages assets across a range of investment strategies, including index-based and active quantitative investment approaches.
George Kaiser Family Foundation is a Tulsa, Oklahoma-based charitable organization founded in 1999 by philanthropist George B. Kaiser.
GF Qianhe Investment Co., Ltd. is a private equity and venture capital firm established in 2012 as a wholly-owned subsidiary of GF Securities.
Gideon Hixon Fund is a family-backed investment fund headquartered in Santa Barbara, California.
Glade Brook Capital Partners is a growth equity firm headquartered in Greenwich, Connecticut.
Glendower Capital, now operating as CVC Secondary Partners, is a London-based private equity firm.
Global Space Ventures is a venture capital firm focused on space industry investments, headquartered in Austin, Texas.
Globalive Capital is a Toronto-based family office and venture firm founded in 1998 by Anthony Lacavera.
Go Capital is a venture capital firm headquartered in Saint Jacques de la Lande, France, and was founded in 2003.
Gobi Partners is a venture capital firm with a focus on Asia, headquartered in Kuala Lumpur and Hong Kong.
Godfrey Capital is a venture capital investment firm founded by Jason Godfrey.

GoingVC Partners is an early-stage venture capital firm based in San Francisco, California. It was established as the investment arm of GoingVC, a global venture capital education and career accelerator. The firm was co-founded by Arno Niazi and John Gannon.
Golan Ventures is a venture capital firm founded in 2018 and headquartered in Tel Aviv, Israel.
Goldcrest Capital is a Dallas, Texas–based venture capital firm founded by Daniel Friedland and Adam Ross that invests in private technology companies.
Founded in 2009, the Golden Triangle Angel Network (GTAN) is a Canadian angel investment group based in Cambridge, Ontario.
Goldman Sachs is a multinational financial services firm founded in 1869 and headquartered in New York City.
Google Ventures (GV) is the venture capital arm of Alphabet, founded in 2009 and based in the San Francisco Bay Area.
Governing Dynamics is a New York-based venture capital firm founded in 2005.

Gradient Ventures is a venture capital fund launched by Google in 2017 to provide capital and resources to AI tech startups. The fund invested directly from Alphabet's balance sheet, with partners composed largely of ex-Google technical leaders who offered hands-on support with AI model architecture, data pipelines, and access to Google's internal resources like TensorFlow experts.

In October 2025, Gradient spun out of Google to operate independently under a new management entity called Grdnt LLC, with managing partners Darian Shirazi and Zach Bratun-Glennon remaining as part of its leadership team.
Gray Line Partners is a growth equity firm based in Bellevue, Washington, founded by Eddie Kang and Rob Hammond, both U.S. Military Academy graduates.
Founded in 2003, Great Oaks Venture Capital is a New York-based venture capital firm specializing in seed and early-stage investments.
Greater Sum Ventures (GSV) is a venture capital and private equity firm based in Knoxville, Tennessee. It was founded by Ross Croley, Lisa Stinnett, and Bill Nix.
Green D Ventures is a venture capital firm, headquartered in San Francisco, founded by Dan Green and Heather D. Green.
Green Pine Capital Partners (GPCP), founded in 1997 by Li Wei and Luo Fei, is a Shenzhen-based venture capital firm.

​Greenbriar Equity Group is a private equity firm based in Greenwich, Connecticut. Founded in 1999, the firm has raised over $10 billion in committed capital and has completed more than 275 acquisitions.

Greylock Partners is a venture capital firm that focuses on early-stage companies in the consumer and enterprise software sectors. Founded in 1965, the firm has over $3.5 billion in committed capital under management.
Grishin Robotics is an early stage venture capital firm based in Menlo Park, California, founded in 2012 by Dmitry Grishin, co-founder of Mail.ru.
Ground Swell Capital LLC is a hedge fund company based in Folly Beach, South Carolina. It manages private funds, including the Ground Swell Cistern Fund, LP.
Group 11 is a VC firm founded by Dovi Frances, an Israeli-American venture capitalist. The firm focuses on Israeli-related software companies.
Guangdong Finance Fund is a Chinese investment firm. It primarily invests in projects in Guangdong, with investment decisions made by the Guangdong government.
GuideStone Financial Services, founded in 1918, offers retirement plans, insurance, and investment services tailored for churches, ministries, and faith-aligned organizations.

Gula Tech Adventures (GTA) is a Maryland-based venture capital firm founded in 2017, specializing in seed and early-stage investments in cybersecurity, software, and IT sectors. It is led by Ron and Cyndi Gula.
H20 Capital Innovation is a cross-border venture capital firm headquartered in Miami, Florida.

Haitong Securities Co., Ltd. was a Chinese brokerage and investment firm headquartered in Shanghai. In September 2024, Haitong Securities announced a merger with Guotai Junan Securities, another Chinese brokerage.
Hakluyt Capital is the investment arm of Hakluyt & Company, the strategic advisory firm that provides intelligence support to corporations and government agencies.
Hal Lambert is an investment manager and founder of Point Bridge Capital.
Halogen Ventures is an early-stage venture capital fund founded by Jesse Draper. It's headquartered in Los Angeles, California.
Hanaco Venture Capital is a venture capital fund based in Tel Aviv that invests in Israeli startups.

Hangzhou Pukang Equity Investment Partnership (LP) is a private equity firm based in Hangzhou, China. It holds a 1.98% stake in Hangzhou Hikvision Digital Technology Co., Ltd., a global provider of video surveillance products.

Hangzhou Weixun Equity Investment Partnership (LP) is a private equity firm based in Hangzhou, China. It is a significant institutional shareholder of Hangzhou Hikvision Digital Technology Co., Ltd, a global provider of video surveillance technologies.

HarbourVest Partners is a global private equity investment firm headquartered in Boston, Massachusetts. It was founded in 1982 by Edward W. Kane and Brooks Zug, and manages over $90 billion in assets.

Hashed is a venture capital firm in the fields of blockchain and Web3 technologies. Founded in 2017 by Simon Seojoon Kim, a serial entrepreneur and leading blockchain evangelist, Hashed is headquartered in Seoul, South Korea, with additional offices in San Francisco, Singapore, Bengaluru, and Abu Dhabi.
Hatch Accelerator is an innovation hub established by Singapore's Home Team Science and Technology Agency (HTX).
HCSD Capital is a private equity firm based in Shenzhen, China.

Heard Capital LLC is a boutique investment firm based in Chicago, Illinois, specializing in hedge fund management. Founded by Timothy M. Heard, the firm focuses on deploying capital across a range of asset classes, including equities, fixed income, and alternative investments.
Hellman & Friedman LLC is a private equity firm established in 1984 and headquartered in San Francisco.
Hercules Capital, headquartered in Palo Alto, California, is a specialty finance company that provides venture debt and growth capital to technology companies.
Hicks Holdings LLC is the private family office of Thomas O. Hicks Sr., headquartered in Dallas, Texas. The firm manages the Hicks family’s holdings.
Highbridge Capital Management is a New York-based investment firm founded in 1992 by Glenn Dubin and Henry Swieca.

Highland Capital Partners, headquartered in Lexington, Massachusetts, is a venture capital firm specializing in seed, early, and growth-stage investments across sectors like software, AI, and big data.

Himel Capital is a venture capital firm based in Israel that focuses on early-stage investments in technology companies. Founded by a team of investors and entrepreneurs, Himel Capital specializes in sectors such as software, artificial intelligence, and cybersecurity. In addition to capital, the firm also provides strategic guidance and access to a broad network of industry contacts.
Hive 2040 R&D Limited Partnership, established in 2021, is a venture capital firm based in Kfar Saba, Israel.
Founded in 2009, HL Investments is a single-family office based in Oklahoma. It is the investment arm of the Green family of Hobby Lobby.
Homebrew is a seed-stage venture capital firm based in San Francisco, California, founded in 2013 by Hunter Walk and Satya Patel.
Homeward Ventures is an early-stage venture capital firm based in St. Peter Port, Guernsey.

HongShan Capital Group (HSG) is a venture capital firm providing investments in early-stage and growth-stage startups, primarily in China. Formerly known as Sequoia China, it rebranded in 2023 after splitting from Sequoia Capital.

Hongzhao Capital is a prominent investment management firm headquartered in Shanghai, China. It operates as a subsidiary of Hangzhou Financial Investment Group (HFI), a state-owned enterprise directly under the government of Hangzhou city.

Horizons Ventures is a venture capital firm based in Hong Kong, known for its investments in early-stage and technology-driven companies. It's founded by Li Ka-shing, a Hong Kong billionaire and investor.
Hoxton Ventures is a London-based venture capital firm founded in 2013.
Hudson River Capital Partners (HRCP) is a small-cap private equity firm based in New York.
Hustle Fund is a venture capital firm that invests in pre-seed startups. It was founded in 2017 by Elizabeth Yin, Eric Bahn, and Shiyan Koh.
Hutchison Telecommunications is a global telecommunications services provider and a subsidiary of CK Hutchison Holdings, one of Hong Kong’s largest multinational conglomerates.
Hyde Park Venture Partners is an early-stage venture capital firm headquartered in Chicago, Illinois.
Hyphen Capital is a San Francisco-based investment firm founded and led by Dave Lu.
Hyundai Mobis Co., Ltd. is a South Korean automotive components manufacturer and a core member of the Hyundai Motor Group.
Hyundai Motor Company, founded in 1967 by Chung Ju-yung, is a South Korean multinational automotive manufacturer headquartered in Seoul.
i3 Equity Partners is a venture capital firm headquartered in Tel Aviv, Israel, founded in 2016 by managing partners Eran Wagner and Noga Kap.
Iberis Capital, founded in 2017, is a Lisbon-based private equity and venture capital firm.

Ibex Investors is an investment firm founded by Justin Borus, who serves as Founder & CEO, and who has built a team of partners spanning both the U.S. and Israel. It's headquartered in Denver, Colorado with an additional office in Tel Aviv.

ICBC Asset Management (Global) is a wholly-owned subsidiary of the Industrial and Commercial Bank of China (ICBC) Group. Based in Hong Kong, the firm serves as ICBC's global asset management platform.
Founded in 2013 and headquartered in San Francisco, ICONIQ Growth is the venture capital arm of ICONIQ Capital.

IDG Capital Partners is a Chinese investment and asset management firm headquartered in Beijing. The firm deploys funds across venture capital, private equity, and mergers and acquisitions, with offices in 15 cities worldwide and approximately $20 billion in accumulated assets under management.

​Imagine K12 is a Silicon Valley-based edtech accelerator founded in 2011 by Geoff Ralston, Tim Brady, and Alan Louie to support early-stage education technology startups. In 2016, it merged with Y Combinator to form YC/Imagine K12.

Imfezeko Investment Holdings (Pty) Ltd. is a private investment and holding company based in Melrose Arch, Johannesburg, South Africa. Leadership includes Richard Ilan Croock and Brian Stephen Croock among its directors.
Impact Fund Denmark (formerly known as IFU - Investment Fund for Developing Countries) is Denmark’s government-supported development finance institution.

Impulse VC is a venture capital fund founded in 2013 that provides funding and operational support to technology and media companies. It has a global portfolio with companies from the USA, UK, and Russia.

In-Q-Tel is a nonprofit venture capital firm founded in 1999 and based in Tysons, Virginia. It was established in partnership with the CIA and is funded primarily through U.S. government contracts, but operates as a legally independent entity. Its mission is to invest in private-sector startups developing technologies relevant to U.S. intelligence and national security, helping agencies like the CIA and broader intelligence community access and integrate technologies in the defense and intelligence sectors. A significant share of In-Q-Tel’s portfolio supports intelligence-related capabilities, including big data analysis and surveillance.
Index Ventures is a global venture capital firm founded in 1996, with offices in San Francisco, London, and Geneva.
​Founded in 2006 by Padmaja Ruparel, Raman Roy, and Saurabh Srivastava, Indian Angel Network (IAN) is India's largest angel investment network, headquartered in New Delhi.
IndiaNivesh Fund is a private equity firm based in Mumbai, India. The firm focuses on providing growth capital to small and medium enterprises (SMEs) in India.
Indigo is a startup accelerator and incubator program initiated by Telkom Indonesia.
Founded in 2020, Inertia Ventures is a venture capital firm based in New York, USA.
​Infocomm Investments is the investment arm of the Infocomm Media Development Authority (IMDA) in Singapore.
Initialized Capital is a venture capital fund founded in 2011 and headquartered in San Francisco, California, USA.
Innogest SGR is an Italian venture capital firm founded in 2006 by Claudio Giuliano, Claudio Rumazza, and Marco Pinciroli.
Innolink Fund, also known as Lianjie Capital, is a venture fund headquartered in Beijing, China.
​InnoSpring is a global venture capital firm and incubator founded in 2012, headquartered in Shanghai with offices in Silicon Valley.
Insight Partners is a global venture capital and private equity firm based in New York, founded in 1995 by Jeff Horing and Jerry Murdock.
Insight Partners is a New York-based global private equity and venture capital firm founded in 1995.
Institute of Computing Technology (ICT), Chinese Academy of Sciences is a Chinese research institute in computer science and technology.
Institutional Venture Partners (aka IVP) is a Silicon Valley venture firm founded in 1980.

Integrity Partners, a U.S.-based investment firm, has acquired the assets of the Israeli spyware company Candiru for up to $30 million. This acquisition involves transferring Candiru's operations and employees to a newly established entity, Integrity Labs Ltd., which is not subject to U.S. sanctions. The move aims to circumvent restrictions imposed by the U.S. government, which blacklisted Candiru in 2021 due to national security concerns.
Intel Capital, headquartered in Santa Clara, California, is a corporate venture capital firm.
The Internet Initiatives Development Fund (IIDF) is a venture fund focusing on Russia-based businesses.
InterWest Partners is a venture capital firm launched in 1979. It's co-founded by Wally Hawley.
Inventus Capital Partners is a venture capital firm founded in 2007 with offices in Menlo Park, California, and Bangalore, India.
Invesco Ltd. is an American independent investment management company that is headquartered in Atlanta, Georgia.
Based in Los Angeles, California, Invest City Capital is a private investment firm specializing in growth-stage companies across multiple sectors.
Investissement Québec, founded in 1998 and headquartered in Quebec, Canada, is a financial institution offering financing solutions to support SMEs and large companies.
Invoke Capital is a Cambridge-based venture capital and private equity firm founded in 2012.
ION Crossover Partners is a growth‑oriented investment firm based in Herzliya, Israel.

Iris Capital, headquartered in Paris, France, is a venture capital firm known for its investments in early to growth-stage technology companies. Founded in 1986, Iris Capital has a long track record of supporting tech startups across various sectors, including information technology, telecommunications, and digital media.

Isaac Zack is an investor known for his involvement in the cybersecurity and surveillance technology sectors. He is associated with being a shareholder and funder of two of the most notorious surveillance companies in Israel whose products are used globally, NSO Group and Candiru.

Israel Aerospace Industries (IAI) is an aerospace and defense company in Israel. Established in 1953, IAI has grown to become one of Israel's largest defense contractors and a prominent player in the global aerospace industry. The company specializes in designing and manufacturing advanced military and commercial aerospace technologies, including satellites and unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs). It invested millions in spyware companies Inpedio and Cytrox through its Singaporian subsidiary, Custodio PTE.
Founded in 2014, Israel Growth Partners (IGP) is a private equity and growth capital firm based in Israel.
The Italian Ministry of Economy and Finance (MEF) is a government institution responsible for managing Italy's economic policy, public finances, and state-owned assets.
J2 Ventures is a venture capital firm based in Boston, Massachusetts, founded in 2020 by Jonathan Bronson and Tom Hennessey.
Jacobs is a global professional services firm, formerly known as Jacobs Engineering Group and now operating as Jacobs Solutions. It's headquartered in Dallas, Texas.

Jane Street Group, LLC is a trading firm and liquidity provider headquartered in New York City. It was co-founded by Tim Reynolds, Rob Granieri, Marc Gerstein, and Michael Jenkins, former traders at Susquehanna International Group.
Janus Henderson Group is a global asset management firm headquartered in London. It was formed from the merger of Janus Capital Group and Henderson Group in 2017.
Founded in 2014, Jaws Ventures is a Miami-based venture capital firm focused on providing growth capital to early and late-stage companies.
JBV Capital is a venture capital firm founded in 2017 and headquartered in San Francisco, California. Jeffrey Bazar serves as the Founder and Managing Director.

Founded by founded by Richard B. Jefferies in 1962, Jefferies Group LLC is a global investment banking and capital markets firm headquartered in New York City. The firm provides a wide range of financial services, including investment banking, equity and debt capital markets, and asset management.

Founded in 1994 by Israeli investor Shlomo Kalish, Jerusalem Global Ventures (JGV) is a management company that manages venture capital funds and invests in Israeli and Israel-related technology startups.
J.F. Shea Co., Inc is a privately held, family-owned company headquartered in Walnut, California.
Jim Hornthal is the Founder and Chairman of Triporati, a personalized travel recommendation platform.

JMP Group LLC is a full-service investment banking and asset management firm founded in 1999 and headquartered in San Francisco, California. The firm specializes in providing a range of financial services, including investment banking, equity research, and capital markets advisory.
Jolt Capital is an independent private equity firm founded in 2011, specializing in growth-stage investments in mid-sized European technology companies. It's headquartered in Paris, France.
JRJ Group is an international private equity investment firm based in London.
Established in 2015, Jundu Investment is a venture capital firm headquartered in Lhasa, China.
K50 Ventures is a New York-based early-stage venture capital firm founded in 2017, specializing in pre-seed and seed investments.
Kaplan EdTech Accelerator was a New York-based accelerator program launched in 2013 through a collaboration between Kaplan, Inc. and Techstars.
Karman Ventures, formerly known as Moving Capital, is a venture capital firm based in Austin, Texas, founded in 2018.

Kayne Partners, the growth private equity group of Kayne Anderson Capital Advisors, specializes in providing growth capital to software companies. Founded in 2002 and based in Los Angeles, the firm focuses on early to late-stage investments and has invested over $740 million in platform investments and add-on acquisitions.
KDDI is a Japanese telecom operator which has a corporate venture capital arm.
Khazanah Nasional Berhad is the sovereign wealth fund of the Government of Malaysia.
Kickstart is a seed-stage venture capital firm founded in 2008 and headquartered in Salt Lake City, Utah.
Kieckhefer Group LLC is a Wisconsin‑based SEC‑registered investment advisory firm that provides retirement-plan consulting and wealth management for individuals and businesses.
Kilometro Rosso is a private innovation hub in Lombardy, Italy that backs emerging companies through its investment activities and support services.
King River Capital is an investment firm headquartered in New South Wales, Australia.
Kirenaga Partners is an early-stage venture capital firm.
Kite Ventures is a venture capital firm, headquartered in Berlin, founded by Andreas Lijoi and Oliver Jung, that invests in early-stage technology companies.
Kohlberg Kravis Roberts (aka KKR & Co. Inc.), founded in 1976 by Jerome Kohlberg Jr., Henry Kravis, and George R. Roberts, is a global investment firm headquartered in New York City.
Founded in 1972, Kleiner Perkins is a venture capital firm based in Menlo Park, California, specializing in early-stage, growth, and incubation investments.

​Koch Disruptive Technologies (KDT) is a venture capital firm founded in November 2017 by Chase Koch, son of Koch Industries CEO Charles Koch. Headquartered in Wichita, Kansas, KDT serves as the venture and growth equity arm of Koch Industries, one of the largest privately held companies in the United States.
​Kristian Andersen is a founding partner at High Alpha, a venture studio and early-stage venture fund based in Indianapolis, Indiana.
La Maison ITF is a Paris-based venture studio and startup incubator founded by Motier Ventures, the family office of the Galeries Lafayette Group.
Labrador Ventures, founded in 1989, is one of the oldest seed stage funds in Silicon Valley.
Lakestar is a European venture capital firm founded in 2012 by Klaus Hommels.
Langsigtet Dansk Kapital (LDK) is a Danish investment firm. It was established in 2021 by several major Danish pension funds, including PensionDanmark, P+, Lægernes Pension, and AP Pension.
Larry Ellison is the co-founder, Chief Technology Officer, and former CEO of Oracle Corporation. With a net worth exceeding $100 billion, he remains Oracle's largest shareholder.
Lauder Partners is a Silicon Valley-based venture capital firm founded in 2000.
LaunchCapital is a New Haven-based micro venture capital firm founded in 2008, specializing in seed and early-stage investments.
Lavrock Ventures is an Arlington, Virginia-based venture capital firm founded in 2015.
Leawood Venture Capital is a venture capital firm headquartered in Leawood, Kansas.
Leeds Equity Partners is a New York-based private equity firm founded in 1993 by Jeffrey T. Leeds and Robert A. Bernstein.
Legend Star (北京联想之星) is the early-stage investment and incubation arm of Legend Holdings (the parent company of Lenovo).
Legion Capital Corporation is a FinTech-focused private equity firm founded in 2015 by Jim Byrd and Shane Hackett.

Lehman Holdings Inc. served as the parent company for Lehman Brothers, established to manage the liquidation of the firm's remaining assets following its collapse, parts of which were later acquired by Nomura Holdings.
Lenovo Capital and Incubator Group (LCIG) is the global technology investment arm of Lenovo Group.
Lerer Hippeau is a seed-stage venture capital firm based in New York City, founded in 2010 by Ben Lerer, Eric Hippeau, and Ken Lerer.
Leta Capital, founded in 2012, is a venture capital firm headquartered in Grand Cayman, Cayman Islands.
Founded in 1996, Levensohn Venture Partners (LVP) is an early stage venture capital firm investing in information technology companies.
Based in San Francisco, California, Levitate Capital invests primarily in companies developing advanced aviation and aerial technologies.
Light Street Capital, headquartered in Palo Alto, California, is a global investment firm specializing in public and private equities, with a primary focus on the technology and media sectors.

Founded in 2000, Lightspeed Venture Partners is a multi-stage venture capital firm headquartered in Menlo Park, California. The firm has regional offices in Israel, India, China, Southeast Asia, and Europe.
